title: National Teacher Shortage
description: Schools report severe teacher shortages, forcing larger class sizes.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Fast-tracking certification risks lowering standards. Students deserve qualified teachers.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: We don’t have the luxury of time. Shortages are worsening every year.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Then raise salaries — attract talent the right way.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: Raising salaries nationwide is financially reckless. We need scalable solutions.
